F-1.description: PII in application logs — customerId/accountId UUIDs logged unmasked
F-1.fix: Created LogMasking utility (maskId/maskKey); applied at 10 log call sites across 4 files

F-2.fix: Created logback-spring.xml with UUID and digit-sequence regex masking for dev/staging/prod profiles

architecture_constraints_verified: Domain layer (domain/) has zero non-package imports — unchanged
IborCheckFilter remains only class reading X-Customer-Id header — unchanged
IborCheckFilter private maskId(String) not broken — coexists with LogMasking.maskId(UUID/String)
CustomerIdResolver reads JWT sub only — unchanged
payload.g7_integration_status: UNCHANGED — no files in integration contract path modified

metadata.notes: All 10 unmasked log call sites across BalanceDashboardController, BalanceDashboardService, AccountClientAdapter, and RedisCacheRepository have been patched with LogMasking.maskId() or LogMasking.maskKey(). logback-spring.xml provides the mandatory defense-in-depth regex safety net for staging and prod profiles. Unit test LogMaskingTest asserts no full UUID appears in maskId or maskKey output. IborCheckFilter retains its own private maskId(String) — no conflict.
